indicator.title: U-6 labor underutilization rate
indicator.notes: Broad labor underutilization measure including unemployed, marginally attached, and part-time for economic reasons. BLS is canonical; FRED U6RATE is only a convenience mirror.

observations.footnotes: Data unavailable due to the 2025 lapse in appropriations.
January 2026 estimates were revised to incorporate updated population controls. For more information, see www.bls.gov/cps/documentation.htm#pop.
